payload.author: claude
payload.body: DONE: cloud middleware accepts session JWT or per-user API key, no shared token / no loopback bypass; verified end-to-end against real Postgres (test/cloud-auth-pg.test.js). The remaining half of the original scope - derive the tenant/board strictly from claims and stop trusting X-Scope-Workspace - is tracked as SCP-187 under the collaboration epic (deliberate split, not dropped).
